name: Advance payment against a bank guarantee
description: Авансовый платёж (15%) под банковскую гарантию возврата аванса. The technical customer accepts the advance request once the guarantor bank's guarantee and the advance invoice are in place; a fixed advance is paid up front and amortized against later КС-3 in the rollup layer (зачёт аванса). Building-level scope (zone=BLDG). The advance amount is supplied at decision time via acceptedValues.advance_base = 15% of contract value.

evidence.description: Банковская гарантия возврата аванса — irrevocable advance-recovery guarantee from the guarantor bank.
Счёт на авансовый платёж — the advance invoice.

checks.description: No advance without a valid bank guarantee and an invoice.
The guarantee must still be valid.

consequences.description: Fixed 15% advance paid up front (no retention on the advance); recovered against later КС-3.
Customer owns advance exposure until recovered.
